staticCommands.name: arg
staticCommands.description: Switches references for .NET based projects via argument

options.description: A map of the versions of projects to be converted to nuget packages (e.g Maxotek.Kernel=4.1;Maxotek.Core=3.0)

staticCommands.name: plugin
staticCommands.description: Switches references for .NET based projects via argument

staticCommands.name: tc
staticCommands.description: Switches references for .NET core based projects using TeamCity

options.description: The Id of the currently running build
The password for the TeamCity server
The base URL of the TeamCity server
The user for the TeamCity server
